title: InventorySource
description: An inventory source representing a fulfillment location in multi-source inventory.

source_code.description: Unique string code identifier for the inventory source.

name.description: Human-readable name of the inventory source.

enabled.description: Whether this source is active and available for inventory assignment.

description.description: Optional description of the inventory source.

latitude.description: Geographic latitude of the source location.

longitude.description: Geographic longitude of the source location.

country_id.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the source address.

region.description: State or region name of the source address.

street.description: Street address of the source location.

postcode.description: Postal code of the source address.
